message:
wa-fno.3: implement extension management CLI (wa ext)

Add extensions.rs core module with list, install, remove, validate,
and info operations for pattern pack extensions. Wire up wa ext
subcommands (list/install/remove/validate/info) in CLI. Add packs()
accessor to PatternEngine. 9 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
